include_rules: If title/body/ocr candidates agree, the resolver may include the record with the highest-priority source.
If the title matches the official distance / time format and candidates do not conflict, include=true.
If the title is missing but body or OCR has a complete high-confidence candidate, include=true.
OCR is candidate evidence only and is never called from frontend code.
Manual overrides are applied after automatic normalization and can replace the final backend decision per post_id.
review_rules: review_needed=true means the resolver could not safely choose a final record.
Candidate conflict, low confidence, missing distance/time, and out-of-range values go to review_queue.
Applied manual overrides clear review_needed and become the backend-authoritative final state.
ui_rule: Frontend must render include/exclude from backend include boolean only and surface review queue from backend review_needed only.
